summary: Iteration 135: Expenses Filter Bug Fix + Sidebar UI + Pagination Improvements. All features verified working. Backend 9/9 tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with screenshots showing branch filter returning correct results (45→7 when filtered by Test Branch).
critical_code_review_comments: Expenses filter bug fixed: Backend /api/expenses now accepts branch_id, category, payment_mode query params for server-side filtering
Frontend ExpensesPage.jsx passes filters via activeBackendFilters state (lines 47, 135-154)
Backend expenses.py lines 17-47 implement server-side filtering for branch_id, category, payment_mode params
Branch monthly expenses summary card added at top of Expenses page (similar to Sales page)
Pagination improved with numbered page buttons (not just Prev/Next) on both Sales and Expenses pages
Sidebar redesigned with Foodics-inspired light gray background (#f8f9fa), collapsible nav groups with smooth expand/collapse
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing expense data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 135: All requested features verified working. Expenses branch filter now sends branch_id to backend API - before fix it was only client-side filtering on 200-record limit. Test showed: All Expenses (45) → filtered by Test Branch → All Expenses (7). Branch summary card shows monthly expenses by branch at top. Pagination supports page numbers when more than 1 page exists. Sidebar has clean Foodics-inspired design with collapsible nav groups.

expenses_filter_bug_fix.description: Branch filter now passes branch_id to backend for server-side filtering
expenses_filter_bug_fix.evidence: Filter changed expense count from 45 to 7 when 'Test Branch' selected

branch_monthly_expenses_summary.description: Card at top of Expenses page shows branch-wise expenses breakdown

pagination_with_page_numbers.description: Both Sales and Expenses pages have numbered pagination buttons
pagination_with_page_numbers.note: Page numbers only visible when totalPages > 1

sidebar_ui_redesign.description: Foodics-inspired sidebar with light gray background and collapsible nav groups

sidebar_active_state.description: Current page highlighted in sidebar navigation with text-primary class
